name: Mystal Haven
short_description: Mystal Haven is a laid-back, open-world creature-collector featuring four-player split-screen and online multiplayer.
detailed_description:
Mystal Haven is a laid-back, open-world creature-collecting game with 4-player split-screen and online multiplayer with your Steam friends or random match-making.

Whether you play with others or go solo, you'll collect cute creatures and explore new worlds. Your single-player saves work in multiplayer, so there's no need to start all over if you want to play online.

Key Features:

  • Multiplayer: Supports both local 4-player split-screen and online multiplayer with your Steam friends and random match-making.

  • Creature Collecting: As you explore, add new creatures to your vault and raise them into more powerful adult versions that grow slightly larger with each level.

  • Creature Battles: Battle using traditional turn-based attacks or real-time overworld attacks. Play the way you want.

  • Creature Interactions: Ride, feed, and even breed your creatures to produce rare hybrid types. You can also give them fun hats to wear.
